texto: In inventing [General Juan Manuel de] Rosas’ self-justification, I have taken the liberty of drawing almost exclusively on the words of Tony Blair, and the various self-justifications he produced to defend his foreign policy adventures with George Bush in the Middle East and the Central Asia.
explicacao: Citação de Harry Thompson sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “In inventing [General Juan Manuel de] Rosas’ self-justification, I have taken the liberty of draw…” articula sucesso, history, novel em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como termino e novel.
